expectations.text: four-sections-present: Output contains all four exec frame sections
expectations.evidence: Uses custom headers (Recommendation, Financial Case, What We Did to Get Here, Migration Plan, Key Risks, Decision Needed) — not the four-part exec frame

expectations.text: no-process-noise: Output does not mention 12 evaluation criteria, 14 stakeholder, 47-page, or 4 phases
expectations.evidence: '12 criteria', '14 stakeholder interviews', '4 phases' all present — process detail retained

expectations.text: recommendation-is-approve: Recommendation asks for approval to proceed to Phase 1
expectations.evidence: 'Requesting approval to proceed to Phase 1' and 'Approve Phase 1 to start immediately'

expectations.text: what-was-removed-included: Output includes a 'What was removed' section
expectations.evidence: No such section — without the skill the editorial logic is not surfaced to the user
